stories.headline: Bitcoin slips back to $78K as $80K wall holds before Wednesday's FOMC
stories.tldr: Bitcoin pulled back from above $79,000 to trade near $78,100 as macro headwinds and a consumer sentiment crash keep bulls bottled up.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: BTC is now moving in near-perfect opposition to the dollar, the most extreme decoupling since 2022, raising the stakes of Wednesday's FOMC.
the_details: BTC up 0.56% on the day to $78,112; ETH up 0.61% to $2,328 per CoinDesk
FOMC decision lands April 29 with BoJ, ECB and BoE all setting policy this week
U. Michigan sentiment hit all-time low of 49.8; 1Y inflation expectation jumped to 4.8% in April

stories.headline: Kelp DAO bridge drained for $292M as April crypto hack tally hits $606M
stories.tldr: An attacker drained 116,500 rsETH (~$292M) from Kelp DAO's LayerZero bridge, making April the worst hack month since February 2025.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Kelp and Drift alone account for 95% of $606M lost in 18 days of April, 3.7x all of Q1 combined and a wake-up call for bridge security.
the_details: Drained ~18% of rsETH circulating supply; emergency freezes hit Aave, SparkLend, Fluid and Upshift
Chainalysis attributes the attack to North Korea's Lazarus Group via off-chain bridge compromise
Drift Protocol lost $285M on April 1 via fake-token oracle manipulation and a compromised admin key

stories.headline: SEC carves out DeFi front-ends from broker rules in landmark April ruling
stories.tldr: SEC staff said Covered User Interface Providers can offer software for trading crypto-asset securities without broker-dealer registration, subject to conditions.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This finally answers the existential threat hanging over DeFi front-ends since the 2022 ENS subpoenas, unlocking U.S. UI development and L2 launches.
the_details: Statement issued April 13, 2026; covers UIs that prepare and submit crypto-security transactions
Builds on the March 17 SEC-CFTC joint release establishing a five-category token taxonomy
Over 100 firms including Coinbase and Ripple are pressing the Senate to mark up the Clarity Act

stories.headline: Solana ETF inflows crater 92% to $34M as SOL trades near $86
stories.tldr: Spot Solana ETF inflows collapsed from $419M in November 2025 to just $34M in April 2026 as SOL trades near $86 with a $49.8B market cap.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The collapse signals institutional fatigue with non-BTC/ETH ETF products and validates concerns about altcoin ETF saturation.
the_details: SOL ranks 7th by market cap; futures open interest at $827M with 68.2% long positioning
Firedancer upgrade still targets 1M TPS by 2026; Alpenglow already cut finality below 200ms
Altcoin season index sits at 33-38/100 with BTC dominance holding firm at 58.1%

stories.headline: Vercel breach sends crypto developers scrambling to rotate API keys
stories.tldr: A security incident at Vercel exposed environment variables, forcing crypto teams to rotate every key and webhook secret deployed through the platform.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Vercel hosts a huge share of crypto frontend infra — wallet providers, dApps and indexers all rely on its env-var pipeline.
the_details: Hack disclosed April 20 by CoinDesk; affected blast radius still being audited by teams
Devs urged to rotate RPC keys, Alchemy and Infura tokens, and webhook secrets immediately
Follows CoW Swap's $1.2M loss on April 14 from an unrelated domain-hijack attack
